headline: MTUM Owns the Winners, but July Could Turn Into a Momentum Bloodbath
summary: Momentum investing sounds like a physics law and behaves like a mood ring. The iShares MSCI USA Momentum Factor ETF (BATS:MTUM) has ridden the AI-chip surge to a 29% year-to-date gain through July 6, but the fund just took its worst weekly hit of the year, dropping nearly 7% in the seven days ending July ... MTUM Owns the Winners, but July Could Turn Into a Momentum Bloodbath

headline: Applied Materials (AMAT) Unveils AI-Powered SENZ Platform to Accelerate Smart Glasses Development
summary: Applied Materials Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) is one of the top 10 hidden AI stocks to buy. headline: Goldman: Be Picky When Buying the Chip Dip
summary: While J.P. Morgan says to buy the recent dip in chip stocks, Goldman Sachs is still wary.  Goldman analysts warn that has created a difficult setup for the subsection of the AI trade.  The PHLX Semiconductor Index has gained more than 83% since the start of the year, compared with a roughly 9.2% gain in the S&P 500 and a 11.6% rise in the tech-heavy Nasdaq.
